content.title: XG VoLTE Test Suite Collection
content.short_description: A comprehensive collection of VoLTE (Voice over LTE) test suites for XG cellular modules across different protocol phases (P2, P3, P4) and a starte...
content.description: A comprehensive collection of VoLTE (Voice over LTE) test suites for XG cellular modules across different protocol phases (P2, P3, P4) and a starter pack. The test suites cover various scenarios including basic calls, supplementary services, SMS functionality, SRVCC handovers, emergency calls, and IMS registration testing for cellular network validation.
content.role: I was the primary developer for multiple VoLTE test packs, creating extensive test scenarios for XG cellular module validation. I developed test scripts for P2 phase covering basic calls, ICS homing, SRVCC functionality, and UT proxy testing. For P3 phase, I created comprehensive test cases including SMS functionality, call forwarding, roaming scenarios, and supplementary services. For P4 phase, I implemented emergency call testing and additional call scenarios. I also contributed to the XG test starter pack with sequential runner functionality and comprehensive test scenario coverage.

achievements: Created comprehensive test coverage for VoLTE functionality across multiple protocol phases
Developed 100+ individual test scenarios covering various cellular network conditions
Implemented sequential test execution framework for coordinated multi-device testing
Established standardized testing methodology for XG cellular module validation
Provided production-ready test suites for cellular network certification and validation
